add-sweet-pretzel.description: Add a sweet pretzel from Jamba Juice to the cart
add-sweet-pretzel.verifier: try { const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.items; return cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'sweet pretzel' && cart[0].storeName === 'Jamba Juice'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

filter-grocery-add-item.description: Filter by Grocery Category and add a Fruit item to the cart
filter-grocery-add-item.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return cart.length === 1 && cart[0].category === 'Fruit' && state.currentCategory === 'grocery'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

search-target.description: Search for 'target' and navigate to Target Store
search-target.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.currentStore.name === 'Target'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-kiwi-strawberries.description: Add bananas and milk from DoorDash Market store (subtotal should be $4.98)
add-kiwi-strawberries.verifier: try { const calculateCartTotal = (items) => { return items.reduce((total, item) => { const price = parseFloat(item.price.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')); return total + price * item.quantity; }, 0); }; const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.items; return cart.length === 2 && cart.some(i => i.itemName === 'Bananas') && cart.some(i => i.itemName === 'Milk') && calculateCartTotal(cart) === 4.98; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

remove-item-from-cart.description: Remove items from cart until only a Burger remains
remove-item-from-cart.verifier: try { const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.items; return cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Burger'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

pick-meal-under-10.description: Pick a Meal Under $10 That Looks Tasty
pick-meal-under-10.verifier: try { const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.items; return cart.length === 1 && cart[0].price < 10; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

clear-cart.description: Add 3 Items and Clear the Cart
clear-cart.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] Checking clear cart verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; const lastClearInfo = state.lastClearInfo; const verifierConsumed = state.verifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] Cart length:', cart.length, 'lastClearInfo:', lastClearInfo, 'verifierConsumed:', verifierConsumed); if (verifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastClearInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] No clear action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidClear = lastClearInfo.itemsBeforeClear >= 3 && cart.length === 0; console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] Valid clear (3+ items cleared):', hasValidClear); if (hasValidClear) { console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markVerifierConsumed(); } return hasValidClear; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

search-starbucks.description: Search for 'starbucks' and navigate to a Starbucks store
search-starbucks.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Starbucks'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-chocolate-cake.description: Search for 'chocolate cake' and navigate to Mellis Cafe
find-chocolate-cake.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Mellis Cafe'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-new-restaurant.description: Search for 'new restaurant' and navigate to Big Save Market
find-new-restaurant.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Big Save Market'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-pizza-restaurants.description: Search for 'pizza' to find restaurants that offer pizza
find-pizza-restaurants.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] Checking pizza restaurants verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const searchResults = state.searchResults; const lastSearchInfo = state.lastSearchInfo; const searchVerifierConsumed = state.searchVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] Search results:', searchResults.length, 'lastSearchInfo:', lastSearchInfo, 'searchVerifierConsumed:', searchVerifierConsumed); if (searchVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastSearchInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] No search action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidSearchTerms = /pizza/i.test(lastSearchInfo.searchTerm); if (!hasValidSearchTerms) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] Invalid search terms for pizza'); return false; } if (searchResults.length === 0) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] No search results found'); return false; } const allHavePizza = searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories && resto.categories.includes('pizza')); console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] All results have pizza:', allHavePizza); if (allHavePizza) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markSearchVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markSearchVerifierConsumed(); } return allHavePizza; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-fast-delivery.description: Search for 'fast delivery' to find restaurants with delivery under 30 minutes
find-fast-delivery.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER find-fast-delivery] Checking fast delivery verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const searchResults = state.searchResults; const lastSearchInfo = state.lastSearchInfo; const searchVerifierConsumed = state.searchVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER find-fast-delivery] Search results:', searchResults.length, 'lastSearchInfo:', lastSearchInfo, 'searchVerifierConsumed:', searchVerifierConsumed); if (searchVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-fast-delivery] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastSearchInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-fast-delivery] No search action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidSearchTerms = /fast|quick|delivery|speed/i.test(lastSearchInfo.searchTerm); if (!hasValidSearchTerms) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-fast-delivery] Invalid search terms for fast delivery'); return false; } if (searchResults.length === 0) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-fast-delivery] No search results found'); return false; } const allFastDelivery = !searchResults.some(resto => parseInt(resto.time, 10) > 30); console.log('[VERIFIER find-fast-delivery] All results have fast delivery:', allFastDelivery); if (allFastDelivery) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-fast-delivery] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markSearchVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markSearchVerifierConsumed(); } return allFastDelivery; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-cooler-bag.description: Navigate to Boichik Bagels and add a Blue Cooler Bag to the cart
add-cooler-bag.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Boichik Bagels' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName === 'Blue Cooler Bag'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-cheap-coffee.description: Search for cheap coffee restaurants and add coffee from Philz Coffee
add-cheap-coffee.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const doesAllHasCoffeeCategory = !state.searchResults.some(resto => !resto.categories.includes('coffee')); const doesAllHas$PriceRange = !state.searchResults.some(rest => rest.priceRange !== '$'); const cart = state.items; const doesCartHasSomeItems = cart.length > 0; const isSelectedRestaurantPhilz = state.currentStore.name === 'Philz Coffee'; return doesAllHasCoffeeCategory && doesAllHas$PriceRange && doesCartHasSomeItems && isSelectedRestaurantPhilz; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-dessert-restaurants.description: Search for dessert restaurants with average price range ($ or $$)
find-dessert-restaurants.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const doesAllHasDessertCategory = !state.searchResults.some(resto => !resto.categories.includes('dessert')); const doesAllHasAveragePriceRange = state.searchResults.filter(resto => resto.priceRange === '$' || resto.priceRange === '$$').length === state.searchResults.length; return doesAllHasDessertCategory && doesAllHasAveragePriceRange; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-cheap-comfort-food.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER find-cheap-comfort-food] Checking cheap comfort food verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const searchResults = state.searchResults; const lastSearchInfo = state.lastSearchInfo; const searchVerifierConsumed = state.searchVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER find-cheap-comfort-food] Search results:', searchResults.length, 'lastSearchInfo:', lastSearchInfo, 'searchVerifierConsumed:', searchVerifierConsumed); if (searchVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-cheap-comfort-food] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastSearchInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-cheap-comfort-food] No search action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidSearchTerms = /cheap.*comfort|comfort.*cheap|affordable.*comfort|comfort.*food.*fast/i.test(lastSearchInfo.searchTerm); if (!hasValidSearchTerms) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-cheap-comfort-food] Invalid search terms for cheap comfort food'); return false; } if (searchResults.length === 0) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-cheap-comfort-food] No search results found'); return false; } const allCheapComfortFoodFast = searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories && resto.categories.includes('comfort-food') && parseInt(resto.time, 10) <= 30 && resto.priceRange === '$'); console.log('[VERIFIER find-cheap-comfort-food] All results are cheap comfort food with fast delivery:', allCheapComfortFoodFast); if (allCheapComfortFoodFast) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-cheap-comfort-food] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markSearchVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markSearchVerifierConsumed(); } return allCheapComfortFoodFast; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-high-rated-desserts.description: Search for 'high rated desserts' to find dessert restaurants over 4.6 rating with DashPass
find-high-rated-desserts.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER find-high-rated-desserts] Checking high rated desserts verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const searchResults = state.searchResults; const lastSearchInfo = state.lastSearchInfo; const searchVerifierConsumed = state.searchVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER find-high-rated-desserts] Search results:', searchResults.length, 'lastSearchInfo:', lastSearchInfo, 'searchVerifierConsumed:', searchVerifierConsumed); if (searchVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-high-rated-desserts] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastSearchInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-high-rated-desserts] No search action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidSearchTerms = /high.*rated.*dessert|rated.*dessert|dessert.*rating|4\.6.*dessert/i.test(lastSearchInfo.searchTerm); if (!hasValidSearchTerms) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-high-rated-desserts] Invalid search terms for high rated desserts'); return false; } if (searchResults.length === 0) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-high-rated-desserts] No search results found'); return false; } const allHighRatedDesserts = searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories && resto.categories.includes('desserts') && resto.dashPass && resto.rating >= 4.6); console.log('[VERIFIER find-high-rated-desserts] All results are high rated desserts with DashPass:', allHighRatedDesserts); if (allHighRatedDesserts) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-high-rated-desserts] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markSearchVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markSearchVerifierConsumed(); } return allHighRatedDesserts; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

reset-search-result.description: Search for 'bakery fast delivery' then reset/clear the search results
reset-search-result.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER reset-search-result] Checking reset search verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const searchResults = state.searchResults; const lastSearchInfo = state.lastSearchInfo; const searchVerifierConsumed = state.searchVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER reset-search-result] Search results length:', searchResults.length, 'lastSearchInfo:', lastSearchInfo, 'searchVerifierConsumed:', searchVerifierConsumed); if (searchVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER reset-search-result] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastSearchInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER reset-search-result] No search action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidSearchTerms = /bakery|fast|delivery/i.test(lastSearchInfo.searchTerm); const hasEmptyResults = searchResults.length === 0; const isValidReset = hasValidSearchTerms && hasEmptyResults; console.log('[VERIFIER reset-search-result] Valid search terms:', hasValidSearchTerms, 'Empty results:', hasEmptyResults, 'Valid reset:', isValidReset); if (isValidReset) { console.log('[VERIFIER reset-search-result] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markSearchVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markSearchVerifierConsumed(); } return isValidReset; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-most-ordered.description: Navigate to Philz Coffee and add 'Mint Mojito Iced Coffee' from the Most Ordered section
add-most-ordered.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Philz Coffee' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName === 'Mint Mojito Iced Coffee'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-cinnamon-roll-combo.description: Add a Cinnamon Roll with Soda combo from Gateway Croissant to the cart
add-cinnamon-roll-combo.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; if (!cart || cart.length === 0 || !cart[0] || !cart[0].customizations) return false; const customizations = cart[0].customizations; const isAllCustomizationsPresent = customizations.includes('#2 · Value Combo') && customizations.includes('Soda'); return state.currentStore.name === 'Gateway Croissant' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Cinnamon Roll' && isAllCustomizationsPresent; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-immunity-shot.description: Navigate to Pressed Acai Bowls and add a default sized Immunity Shot to the cart
add-immunity-shot.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; if (!cart || cart.length === 0 || !cart[0]) return false; const isCustomizationsEmpty = Array.isArray(cart[0].customizations) ? cart[0].customizations.length === 0 : !cart[0].customizations; return state.currentStore.name === 'Pressed Acai Bowls' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Immunity Shot' && isCustomizationsEmpty; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-customized-croissant.description: Navigate to Gateway Croissant and add a Ham, Egg and Cheese Croissant with Large size, Light Salad, Fruit Portion, Juice, and Low Sugar
add-customized-croissant.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; if (!cart || cart.length === 0 || !cart[0] || !cart[0].customizations) return false; const customizations = cart[0].customizations; const isAllCustomizationsPresent = customizations.includes('Large') && customizations.includes('Light Salad') && customizations.includes('Fruit Portion') && customizations.includes('Juice') && customizations.includes('Low Sugar'); return state.currentStore.name === 'Gateway Croissant' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Ham, Egg and Cheese Croissant' && isAllCustomizationsPresent; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-two-custom-lattes.description: Add 2 Caffè Latte from Starbucks: one vegan medium size and one low sugar small size
add-two-custom-lattes.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; if (!cart || cart.length < 2 || !cart[0] || !cart[1] || !cart[0].customizations || !cart[1].customizations) return false; const firstCartItemIsCorrect = cart[0].itemName === 'Caffè Latte' && cart[0].customizations.includes('Medium') && cart[0].customizations.includes('Vegan Option'); const secondCartItemIsCorrect = cart[1].itemName === 'Caffè Latte' && cart[1].customizations.includes('Small') && cart[1].customizations.includes('Low Sugar'); return state.currentStore.name.includes('Starbucks') && cart.length === 2 && firstCartItemIsCorrect && secondCartItemIsCorrect; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-croissant-high-rated.description: Search for high-rated bakeries (over 4.6 rating) and add a bagel to the cart
add-croissant-high-rated.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; const allBakeryRatingOver4point6 = state.searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories.includes('bakery') && resto.rating >= 4.6); return allBakeryRatingOver4point6 && cart.length === 1 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName.toLowerCase().includes('bagel'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

increase-bagel-quantity.description: Add a Classic bagel and a YooHoo beverage to Boichik Bagels cart and then increase the quantity of bagels to 4
increase-bagel-quantity.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Boichik Bagels') && cart.length === 2 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName === 'Classic' && cart[0].quantity === 4 && cart[1] && cart[1].itemName === 'YooHoo' && cart[1].quantity === 1; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

remove-coffee-from-cart.description: Add a Turkey Sausage Sandwich and a Philtered Soul coffee from Philz Coffee then remove the coffee from the cart
remove-coffee-from-cart.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Philz Coffee') && cart.length === 1 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName === 'Turkey Sausage Sandwich'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-recommended-item.description: Add a medium Bacon Burrito with snack from Philz Coffee and then complement the cart with a recommended item
add-recommended-item.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; if (!cart || cart.length === 0 || !cart[0] || !cart[0].customizations) return false; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Philz Coffee') && cart.length === 2 && cart[0].itemName === 'Bacon Burrito' && cart[0].customizations.includes('Medium') && cart[0].customizations.includes('Snack Item'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

clear-all-items.description: Add a juice pack, a shot pack and a smoothie from Pressed Acai Bowls and then clear all items from the cart
clear-all-items.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Pressed Acai Bowls') && cart.length === 0; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

start-new-order.description: Start new order from Gateway Croissant
start-new-order.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; const allItemsFromGatewayCroissant = cart.every(item => item.storeName === 'Gateway Croissant'); return state.currentStore.name.includes('Gateway Croissant') && cart.length > 0 && allItemsFromGatewayCroissant; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

adjust-cart-quantities.description: Add one more Latte and remove one Apple Juice from the cart
adjust-cart-quantities.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('IL Canto Cafe') && cart.length === 2 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName === 'Latte' && cart[0].quantity === 2 && cart[1] && cart[1].itemName === 'Apple Juice' && cart[1].quantity === 2; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-fast-grocery-item.description: Search for 'fast grocery' to find grocery stores with delivery under 30 minutes
add-fast-grocery-item.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fast-grocery-item] Checking fast grocery item verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const searchResults = state.searchResults; const lastSearchInfo = state.lastSearchInfo; const searchVerifierConsumed = state.searchVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER add-fast-grocery-item] Search results:', searchResults.length, 'lastSearchInfo:', lastSearchInfo, 'searchVerifierConsumed:', searchVerifierConsumed); if (searchVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fast-grocery-item] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastSearchInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fast-grocery-item] No search action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidSearchTerms = /fast.*grocery|quick.*grocery|grocery.*fast|grocery.*delivery/i.test(lastSearchInfo.searchTerm); if (!hasValidSearchTerms) { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fast-grocery-item] Invalid search terms for fast grocery'); return false; } if (searchResults.length === 0) { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fast-grocery-item] No search results found'); return false; } const allFastGrocery = !searchResults.some(store => parseInt(store.time, 10) > 30); console.log('[VERIFIER add-fast-grocery-item] All grocery stores have fast delivery:', allFastGrocery); if (allFastGrocery) { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fast-grocery-item] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markSearchVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markSearchVerifierConsumed(); } return allFastGrocery; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-organic-eggs.description: Navigate to Sprouts Farmers Market and add 2 Vital Farms Organic Pasture Raised Eggs to the cart
add-organic-eggs.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Sprouts Farmers Market' && cart.length === 2 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName === 'Vital Farms Organic Pasture Raised Eggs '; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-vegetables.description: Shop for vegetables (cucumber, broccoli and carrot) on Target
add-vegetables.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; const itemList = cartItems.map(item=>item.itemName); return state.currentStore.name === 'Target' && JSON.stringify(itemList.sort()) === JSON.stringify(['Baby Carrots', 'Broccoli Crown', 'Cucumber']); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-fruits.description: Go to Gus's Community Market and shop for fruits: 3 kiwis, 1 avocado, 1 bunch of strawberries
add-fruits.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; if (!cartItems || cartItems.length < 3) return false; const avocado = cartItems[0]; const kiwi = cartItems[1]; const strawberries = cartItems[2]; return state.currentStore.name === 'Gus\'s Community Market' && avocado && avocado.itemName == 'Avocado' && avocado.quantity == 1 && kiwi && kiwi.itemName == 'Kiwi' && kiwi.quantity == 3 && strawberries && strawberries.itemName == 'Strawberries' && strawberries.quantity == 1; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

remove-cheese.description: Remove Sargento String Cheese Mozzarella from the cart
remove-cheese.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER remove-cheese] Checking remove cheese verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; const lastRemovalInfo = state.lastRemovalInfo; const removalVerifierConsumed = state.removalVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER remove-cheese] Cart items:', cartItems.length, 'lastRemovalInfo:', lastRemovalInfo, 'removalVerifierConsumed:', removalVerifierConsumed); if (removalVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER remove-cheese] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastRemovalInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER remove-cheese] No removal action recorded'); return false; } const wasCheeseRemoved = lastRemovalInfo.removedItems.some(item => item.itemName === 'Sargento String Cheese Mozzarella'); const hasCheese = cartItems.some(item => item.itemName === 'Sargento String Cheese Mozzarella'); const isValidRemoval = wasCheeseRemoved && !hasCheese; console.log('[VERIFIER remove-cheese] Cheese was removed:', wasCheeseRemoved, 'Cart has cheese:', hasCheese, 'Valid removal:', isValidRemoval); if (isValidRemoval) { console.log('[VERIFIER remove-cheese] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markRemovalVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markRemovalVerifierConsumed(); } return isValidRemoval; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

change-apple-quantity.description: Change quantity of apples to 6 in the cart
change-apple-quantity.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; const hasSixApples = cartItems.some(function(el) { return el.quantity == 6 && el.itemName == 'Apple'; }); return hasSixApples; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

start-new-grocery-order.description: Start a new grocery order from Target
start-new-grocery-order.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Target' && cartItems.length > 0; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-gift-from-michaels.description: Navigate to Michaels and add a $2.99 gift item to the cart
add-gift-from-michaels.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Michaels' && cartItems.length == 1 && cartItems[0] && cartItems[0].price == '$2.99'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-headphones.description: Navigate to Best Buy and add 2 JBL TUNE520BT wireless headphones to the cart
add-headphones.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Bestbuy' && cartItems.length == 1 && cartItems[0] && cartItems[0].quantity == 2 && cartItems[0].itemName == 'JBL - TUNE520BT wireless on-ear headphones - Black'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-pet-items.description: Search for a dog poop bag and a cat shampoo on PetSmart and add it to the cart
add-pet-items.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; if (!cartItems || cartItems.length < 2) return false; const poopBags = cartItems[0]; const catShampoo = cartItems[1]; return state.currentStore.name === 'PetSmart' && cartItems.length == 2 && poopBags && poopBags.quantity == 1 && poopBags.itemName == 'Earth Rated Dog Poop Bags Refill Roll Unscented (120 ct)' && catShampoo && catShampoo.quantity == 1 && catShampoo.itemName == 'Advantage Treatment Shampoo for Cats & Kittens (8 oz)'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-milk-from-safeway.description: Search for Safeway in the Grocery section and add a gallon of milk to the cart
add-milk-from-safeway.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const searchResults = state.searchResults; if (searchResults[0] && searchResults[0].name !== 'Safeway') return false; const cartItems = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Safeway' && cartItems.length == 1 && cartItems[0] && (cartItems[0].name === 'Lucerne Vitamin D Whole Milk Carton' || cartItems[0].itemName === 'Lucerne Vitamin D Whole Milk Carton') && cartItems[0].quantity == 1; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-airpods.description: Search for Best Buy in the Retail section and add a pair of AirPods Pro 2 to the cart
add-airpods.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Best Buy') && cart.length === 1 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName.includes('Apple - AirPods Pro 2'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }
